summary: The deal is classified as at-risk because the customer's non-negotiable, gating requirement for EU data residency—which must be reflected in the contract/rollout plan with a named owner—is entirely absent from all generated follow-up artifacts (proposal, launch plan, and product scope). Under the strict evaluation criteria, this represents an unowned, unaddressed revenue-critical blocker.
droppedRequirements: EU data residency for all PII-bearing workloads in EU-region infrastructure
Named owner accountable for EU data residency on the vendor side
Data residency reflected in the contract and rollout/launch plan
